#  About Budget Changes On Owner Invoices 
Table of Contents 
##  Considerations 
### Prerequisites
  * An administrator must enable the [Invoicing](https://support.procore.com/products/online/user-guide/project-level/invoicing) tool. See [Add and Remove Project Tools](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/add-and-remove-project-tools).
  * The user must be viewing the modernized owner invoice experience. 
  * A user must create a prime contract. See [Create Prime Contracts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-prime-contracts).
  * A user must create an owner invoice for the prime contract. See [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices).


### Limitations
Please be aware of the following limitations:
  * Approved budget changes can only be added to the most recent owner invoice on a prime contract.


[ Overview ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-budget-changes-on-owner-invoices/)
title: About Budget Changes On Owner Invoices - Considerations
